title: CBSE Maths exam 2026: Can AI tools help students revise smarter?
description: With the Central Board of Secondary Education Class 12 Maths board exam scheduled for March 9, 2026, students are deep into last-minute revision. But can AI tools actually help simplify complex concepts and improve practice in the final days before the exam? Educators say when used wisely, artificial intelligence may become a useful support system for board exam preparation.
content:
The Central Board of Secondary Education Class 12 Mathematics board exam will be held on March 9, 2026, prompting students across the country to intensify their final round of revision.

title: Andrii Slobodian: Artificial Intelligence - The Perfect Assistant for Gen Z
description: Social research shows that Generation Z leads the way in adopting artificial intelligence and digital technologies. Zoomers are taking key roles in high-tech fields and mastering AI tools at a rapid pace. Andrii Slobodian, an online growth expert, is a clear example of this trend: at just 21 years old, he is already building unique online community systems that generate millions of views every day.
